channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guerrero plans to become free agent after season, fails to reach long-term deal with Blue Jays
item.description: DUNEDIN, Fla. (AP) — Vladimir Guerrero Jr. plans to become a free agent after the season following the passing of his deadline Tuesday to reach a long-term agreement with the Toronto Blue Jays.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Transport strike affecting Olympic test event underscores risks facing Milan-Cortina Games
item.description: ROME (AP) — A transport strike during an official test event for the Milan-Cortina Olympics highlighted why organizers are negotiating with trade unions to avoid a similar scenario during next year's Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Excitement builds for US-Canada 4 Nations final after raucous 1st game
item.description: Team USA and Canada will meet in the 4 Nations Face-Off final on Thursday night in Boston after a raucous first game had almost everything a hockey fan could want.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Notre Dame moves up to No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll, has busy week ahead
item.description: Notre Dame ascended to No. 1 in The Associated Press women's basketball poll Monday, becoming the third team to reach that spot this season. It's the first time since the 2020-21 season that there have been that many teams to hold the top spot in one year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tobe Awaka has a double-double as No. 19 Arizona snaps 2-game skid with a 74-67 win at Baylor
item.description: WACO, Texas (AP) — Tobe Awaka had 14 points and 12 rebounds as No. 19 Arizona moved into second place alone in the Big 12 Conference with a 74-67 win at Baylor on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Curry listed as world's second-highest paid athlete in 2024: report
item.description: (KRON) -- Golden State Warriors megastar Stephen Curry is one of the world's most famous athletes. With fame, comes fortune. There is no surprise Curry was one of the highest-paid athletes in the world last year.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Flagg has 17 points and 14 rebounds as No. 3 Duke beats Virginia 80-62
item.description: CHARLOTTESVILLE, Va. (AP) — Freshman star Cooper Flagg had 17 points and 14 rebounds, notching his seventh double-double of the season before halftime, as No. 3 Duke cruised past Virginia 80-62 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cam Ward has answer for anyone who thinks he quit on Miami after breaking TD record in bowl game
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — While Cam Ward hasn't decided if he will throw at the NFL combine next week, the quarterback knows how he will answer any scouts or team personnel who ask him if he quit on the Miami Hurricanes team by not finishing his final game with them.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: College student wins $100K after beating NBA All-Star in 3-point contest
item.description: College student Jaren Barajas, 18, hit the shot of his life on Sunday night at the 2025 NBA All-Star Game, as he beat Damian Lillard and won $100,000.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canadian national anthem booed, but only lightly, at 4 Nations hockey tournament
item.description: The Canadian national anthem was lightly booed by the fans at the 4 Nations Face-Off on Monday in apparent payback for the jeering of “The Star-Spangled Banner” during the opening rounds in Montreal last week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Notre Dame basketball coach goes on fiery rant in defense of team after latest loss
item.description: Notre Dame Fighting Irish men's basketball head coach Micah Shrewsberry had a fiery defense of his team following a loss to Louisville on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Notre Dame moves up to No. 1 in AP poll for first time since 2019 after UCLA suffers 1st loss
item.description: Notre Dame is No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women’s basketball poll for the first time since 2019.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: The All-Star break is almost over. It's time for the stretch run toward the NBA playoffs
item.description: The trade deadline is gone. The All-Star break is about to end. Luka Doncic is with the Los Angeles Lakers.Jimmy Butler is with the Golden State Warriors. Anthony Davis is with the Dallas Mavericks, though it's unknown when he'll play again. The dust has settled. It's time for the stretch run.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dion Jordan, former highly touted NFL prospect, owns up to failed success at pro level
item.description: Former top draft pick Dion Jordan spoke out about his struggles in his NFL career and his failing to mature as a player when he was with the Miami Dolphins.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Auburn baseball star Cade Belyeu crushes 1st homer of season hours after mother's death
item.description: Auburn Tigers outfielder Cade Belyeu launched a home run in the team's opening game against the Holy Cross Crusaders hours after his mother died.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Stanton hasn't swung bat in 3 or 4 weeks and is unsure of whether he can play in opener
item.description: New York Yankees slugger Giancarlo Stanton hasn’t swung a bat in three or four weeks and isn’t sure whether he will be ready for opening day because of painful tendinitis in both elbows.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LeBron James takes heat for late decision to skip NBA All-Star Game
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James drew some blowback on Sunday night as he announced he would not participate in the All-Star Game 90 minutes before gametime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The idea of a US vs. World matchup in the NBA All-Star Game has some player support
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama has already gone up against the U.S. in international events, most notably last year's Paris Olympics when he led France's march to the gold medal game against the Americans. He'd like to be in that position more often — maybe even annually.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo passes Bob Knight for most Big Ten conference wins
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Michigan State’s Tom Izzo followed one of the most disappointing losses of his coaching career with a record-setting victory. For Illinois, it was a game in which nothing went right after halftime — or during it, thanks to an unfortunate jersey-raising snafu. The No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, WGN 9
